creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to fgorter from comment #10)

lang/spidermonkey115 is on review for almost 1 month, nobody cared. Blame ports committers!

I use this port since I use GNOME 45.

polkit-gnome is not anymore maintained by upstream. It should have been removed long time ago.

GNOME Shell provides a polkit agent (like budgie-desktop, also tested with pantheon-agent-polkit), and they work fine with polkit 123 and 124.
